title: Blue Jasmine
creator: Woody Allen
description: A former New York socialite tries to rebuild her life after everything falls apart.
whyForActors: Cate Blanchett won the Academy Award for Best Actress for this role.

title: All About Eve
creator: Joseph L. Mankiewicz
description: An ambitious young woman enters the orbit of a celebrated theatre star.
whyForActors: Bette Davis plays Margo Channing, a stage actress at the centre of the story.

title: A Woman Under the Influence
creator: John Cassavetes
description: A woman’s inner world strains against the expectations of family and marriage.
whyForActors: Gena Rowlands received an Academy Award nomination for this performance.

title: Manchester by the Sea
creator: Kenneth Lonergan
description: A man returns home after a family tragedy and is forced to face his past.
whyForActors: Casey Affleck won the Academy Award for Best Actor for this role.

title: Portrait of a Lady on Fire
creator: Céline Sciamma
description: An artist is commissioned to paint a young woman’s portrait before her arranged marriage.
whyForActors: Notice how much of the interaction is carried through silence and eye contact.

title: Black Swan
creator: Darren Aronofsky
description: A dancer’s pursuit of perfection begins to blur the boundaries of reality.
whyForActors: Natalie Portman won the Academy Award for Best Actress for this role.

title: There Will Be Blood
creator: Paul Thomas Anderson
description: An oilman’s rise to power in early California.
whyForActors: Daniel Day-Lewis won the Academy Award for Best Actor for this role.

title: Moonlight
creator: Barry Jenkins
description: A young man’s life is explored across three defining chapters.
whyForActors: The lead character is played by three different actors at different ages.

title: Lady Bird
creator: Greta Gerwig
description: A teenager navigates relationships, identity, and leaving home.
whyForActors: Saoirse Ronan received an Academy Award nomination for this role.

title: The Favourite
creator: Yorgos Lanthimos
description: A power struggle unfolds in the court of Queen Anne.
whyForActors: Olivia Colman won the Academy Award for Best Actress for this role.

title: Call Me by Your Name
creator: Luca Guadagnino
description: A summer relationship unfolds in Northern Italy.
whyForActors: The film follows a single relationship over a defined period of time.

title: The Master
creator: Paul Thomas Anderson
description: A drifter becomes involved with a charismatic leader.
whyForActors: Features a central dynamic between two contrasting characters.

title: Frances Ha
creator: Noah Baumbach
description: A young woman navigates friendships and adulthood in New York.
whyForActors: Shot in black and white with a loose, naturalistic style.

title: The Social Network
creator: David Fincher
description: The founding of Facebook and the disputes that followed.
whyForActors: Known for fast-paced dialogue and overlapping conversations.

title: Room
creator: Lenny Abrahamson
description: A mother and child attempt to adjust to life after captivity.
whyForActors: Brie Larson won the Academy Award for Best Actress for this role.

title: Her
creator: Spike Jonze
description: A man develops a relationship with an artificial intelligence system.
whyForActors: The central relationship is largely between a physical and non-physical presence.

title: Whiplash
creator: Damien Chazelle
description: A young drummer trains under an intense instructor.
whyForActors: Focuses on a highly demanding mentor-student dynamic.

title: The Assistant
creator: Kitty Green
description: A day in the life of a junior assistant in a film production company.
whyForActors: Most of the story unfolds through small, everyday interactions.

title: Lost in Translation
creator: Sofia Coppola
description: Two strangers form a connection in Tokyo.
whyForActors: Much of the relationship develops through quiet, observational moments.
